creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 150107
A possible patch to bump the port

Dear maintainer

Please consider bumping arp-scan to 1.9 since it fixes the get-iab and get-oui scripts as well adds support for DragonFly which also uses this ports tree. See: https://github.com/royhills/arp-scan/releases

New versions of arp-scan are published on github according to the project page.

Following the porters handbook I tried using USE_GITHUB and other Github-related varibles but failed to make it work. Then I came up with a less beautiful way that resulted in something that at least builds and runs. 

I'm not 100% if we can get rid of GNU_CONFIGURE, however the result built and ran with or without it. Without ldconfig however it fails to build, so we still need it
